name: Project Codename
description: Executive reporting dashboard for project milestone tracking and team velocity monitoring

milestones.name: Phase 1: Foundation
milestones.description: Core infrastructure and API layer development

milestones.name: Phase 2: MVP Features
milestones.description: Dashboard UI, reporting components, data integration

workItems.title: Dashboard Layout Component
workItems.description: Create responsive grid-based dashboard layout with header, timeline, metrics, and work items sections

workItems.title: Milestone Timeline Visualization
workItems.description: Implement horizontal timeline using Chart.js with color-coded milestone status indicators

workItems.title: Project Metrics Component
workItems.description: Build KPI cards displaying completion percentage, health status, and velocity metrics

workItems.title: Work Item Status Grouping
workItems.description: Implement three-column layout grouping work items by Shipped, InProgress, and CarriedOver status

workItems.title: DataProvider Service Implementation
workItems.description: Build JSON loading, parsing, validation, and in-memory caching service layer

workItems.title: Print/Screenshot CSS Optimization
workItems.description: Create print media queries and responsive styles optimized for PowerPoint screenshots at 1280x720 and 1920x1080

workItems.title: Error Handling & Validation
workItems.description: Add comprehensive error handling for missing data.json, invalid JSON, and schema validation failures

workItems.title: Unit Test Coverage
workItems.description: Write xUnit tests for DataProvider, caching, validation logic, and error scenarios with >85% coverage
